title: Mmolland
compiled_truth: Mmolland is an external contact at [Brobeck](companies/brobeck). Over the corpus period (2000-12-06 to 2001-09-04), Mmolland sent 28 and received 71 emails, totalling 99 interactions. Top correspondents: [B  Sanders](people/b-sanders) (23), [C  Williams](people/c-williams) (19), [Pmeringolo](people/pmeringolo-brobeck) (16), [Adsmith](people/adsmith-brobeck) (13), [Meringolo](people/meringolo) (13).
